You confirm that:

- You are the sole author of the contribution, **or** you have the right to submit it on behalf of its authors.
- The contribution does not violate any third-party intellectual property rights.

## 3. No obligation

Submitting a contribution does not obligate the maintainer to include it in the project.

## 4. Employer-owned work

If any part of your contribution was created during the course of employment or under a contract that gives your employer rights over your work, you confirm that your employer has approved the contribution or waived such rights.

## 5. Acceptance

You accept these terms by opening a pull request against this repository. No signature is required — your git commit and PR are your agreement.
